hero.summary: Java Backend Developer with 3+ years of experience building scalable backend systems, microservices, and ETL pipelines in cybersecurity domain (Atos / Eviden). Specialized in Spring Boot, Apache NiFi, and cloud-based architectures.

highlights.title: Microservices Architecture
highlights.description: Designed and developed scalable microservices using Spring Boot for onboarding, log processing, and automation workflows.

highlights.title: ETL & Data Pipelines
highlights.description: Built robust ETL pipelines using Apache NiFi to process large-scale security logs with high reliability.

highlights.title: Cloud & Automation
highlights.description: Automated AWS infrastructure provisioning using CloudFormation, EC2, S3, and IAM integrations.

about: Java Backend Developer with 3+ years of experience in building scalable backend systems. Worked in cybersecurity domain at Atos (Eviden), developing microservices and ETL pipelines using Apache NiFi and Spring Boot.

strengths.title: System Design
strengths.description: Strong understanding of microservices architecture, API design, and scalable backend systems.

strengths.title: Performance Optimization
strengths.description: Experienced in optimizing queries, improving system performance, and handling large data volumes.

strengths.title: Cloud Integration
strengths.description: Hands-on experience with AWS services like EC2, S3, IAM, and infrastructure automation.

strengths.title: Problem Solving
strengths.description: Debugging production issues, handling edge cases, and ensuring system reliability.

projects.name: AI-Powered Portfolio
projects.description: Developed a personal portfolio integrated with an AI agent to answer recruiter questions using OpenAI API.
projects.impact: Created an interactive resume experience improving recruiter engagement.

projects.name: Log Processing System

projects.impact: Handled high-volume log ingestion with zero data loss.

projects.name: Cloud Automation Microservice
projects.description: Developed Spring Boot microservice to automate AWS infrastructure provisioning using CloudFormation.
projects.impact: Reduced manual effort and improved deployment speed.
